items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
[Balenciaga] New Crush Tote "Trash Bag", perfectly combining the Trash Bag shape with Crush elements. The wrinkled texture highlights the excellent touch. Soft washed denim and sheep leather ➕ paired with silver vintage hardware ➕ drawstring closure ➕ bold logo print. Compared to the 22bag, the real item is lighter, and cowhide is more wear-resistant than sheepskin. It captures the essence of the "Trash Bag" better than Chanel. It is a definitely large-capacity bucket bag where items can be easily thrown in. The drawstring design is this year's fashion trend; just pull gently to gather the opening. The chain design allows for hand carry, shoulder carry, or underarm carry, as well as crossbody tote, etc. Casual and unconstrained is the attitude this bag should have ✔️
Style No.: BG0305, Large Size: Length 39.8 x Height 45.9 x Width 13.9cm; Small Size: Length 23.8 x Height 25.9 x Width 9.9cm.

items.name_en: New arrival printed hourglass bag large ☀ Balenciaga Paris,👉 This season's heavy hitter pearlescent hourglass bag, unique iconic curved shape is highly recognizable 💗, instantly eye-catching and super cool, appearance presents a crescent moon shape 💘 with a metal B-shaped ring ✨, cowhide texture is also very impressive and full of style, daily essentials or carefully selected versatile and trendy, this Parisian hourglass bag will definitely explode in popularity this year, elegant exquisite and unique, instantly eye-catching, hard not to be noticed ⚠ 😄, handheld or crossbody looks amazing 😍, absolutely a goddess' favorite, of course I love it to death! Can be salty or sweet, that's the effect. Capacity tested: phone, coin purse, compact powder, lipstick, power bank, keys, small pack of tissues, all can be easily loaded, inspection available. Size: Large 23-10-14cm
